interfaces.name: getHomeOverview
interfaces.description: Fetch content for the homepage: featured projects, recent tutorials, upcoming workshops, and highlighted artists.

interfaces.name: searchSiteContent
interfaces.description: Sitewide search for projects, tutorials, articles, products, and events with optional filters and sorting.

interfaces.name: getProjectFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filters for the Projects listing page, such as categories, materials, difficulties, and build time ranges.

interfaces.name: listProjects
interfaces.description: List projects for the Projects page using filters and sorting.

interfaces.name: getProjectDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a project, including materials and related artist info.

artist.description: Creator of the project, if available

interfaces.name: getUserProjectCollections
interfaces.description: Get all project collections for the current user for use in dropdowns and My Library.

interfaces.name: createProjectCollection
interfaces.description: Create a new project collection, optionally adding an initial project.

interfaces.name: addProjectToCollection
interfaces.description: Add a project to an existing project collection.

interfaces.name: getProjectCollectionDetails
interfaces.description: Get details and projects inside a specific project collection.

interfaces.name: removeProjectFromCollection
interfaces.description: Remove a project from a collection from My Library management views.

interfaces.name: createMaterialsListFromProject
interfaces.description: Create a materials list and populate it with all materials from a project.

interfaces.name: addProjectMaterialToMaterialsList
interfaces.description: Add a single material from a project to a chosen materials list.

interfaces.name: getUserMaterialsLists
interfaces.description: Get all materials lists belonging to the current user.

interfaces.name: getMaterialsListDetails
interfaces.description: Get details and items for a specific materials list.

interfaces.name: removeItemFromMaterialsList
interfaces.description: Remove an item from a materials list in My Library.

interfaces.name: getArticleFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options (categories, tags, difficulties, reading time ranges) for the Blog & Tutorials page.

interfaces.name: listArticles
interfaces.description: List articles and tutorials for the Blog & Tutorials page using filters and sorting.

interfaces.name: getArticleDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for an article or tutorial, including metadata used for display.

interfaces.name: getArticleComments
interfaces.description: Fetch comments for an article or tutorial.

interfaces.name: postArticleComment
interfaces.description: Post a new comment on an article or tutorial.

interfaces.name: getUserReadingLists
interfaces.description: Get all reading lists for the current user.

interfaces.name: createReadingList
interfaces.description: Create a new reading list, optionally adding an initial article.

interfaces.name: addArticleToReadingList
interfaces.description: Add an article or tutorial to an existing reading list.

interfaces.name: getReadingListDetails
interfaces.description: Get details and items in a specific reading list.

interfaces.name: removeArticleFromReadingList
interfaces.description: Remove an article from a reading list in My Library.

interfaces.name: getForumOverview
interfaces.description: Get all forum categories and their subforums for the Community Overview page.

interfaces.name: getSubforumThreads
interfaces.description: Get threads for a specific subforum, used to display the subforum page.

interfaces.name: searchSubforumThreads
interfaces.description: Search threads within a subforum by keyword.

interfaces.name: createForumThread
interfaces.description: Create a new thread in a subforum with initial post content.

interfaces.name: getThreadWithPosts
interfaces.description: Get thread details and all posts for the Forum Thread page.

interfaces.name: replyToThread
interfaces.description: Post a reply in an existing forum thread.

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Shop / Marketplace page.

interfaces.name: listProducts
interfaces.description: List marketplace products with filters and sorting.

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a product for the Product Detail page.

interfaces.name: getUserWishlists
interfaces.description: Get all product wishlists for the current user.

interfaces.name: createWishlist
interfaces.description: Create a new wishlist, optionally adding an initial product.

interfaces.name: addProductToWishlist
interfaces.description: Add a product to an existing wishlist.

interfaces.name: getWishlistDetails
interfaces.description: Get details and items in a specific wishlist.

interfaces.name: removeProductFromWishlist
interfaces.description: Remove a product from a wishlist in My Library.

interfaces.name: getArtistFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Artists Directory page.

interfaces.name: listArtists
interfaces.description: List artists in the directory with filters and sorting.

interfaces.name: getArtistProfile
interfaces.description: Get full artist profile, including projects, products, and follow status.

interfaces.name: followArtist
interfaces.description: Follow or unfollow an artist.

interfaces.name: updateArtistNotificationSettings
interfaces.description: Enable or disable notifications for an artist’s new projects or posts.

interfaces.name: getFollowedArtists
interfaces.description: Get all artists followed by the current user, including notification settings.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Events & Workshops page.

interfaces.name: listEvents
interfaces.description: List events and workshops using filters and sorting for the Events page.

interfaces.name: getEventDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for an event or workshop for the Event Detail page.

interfaces.name: registerForEvent
interfaces.description: Register the current user for an event/workshop with an on-site payment option.

interfaces.name: getMyLibraryOverview
interfaces.description: Get a summary of the user's project collections, reading lists, wishlists, materials lists, and followed artists for the My Library page.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Fetch static About page content explaining the site’s purpose and how to get started.

interfaces.name: getHelpContent
interfaces.description: Fetch Help & Contact page content including FAQs and community guidelines.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a message via the Help & Contact form.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateDefaultWishlist
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create a default wishlist object in storage.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateMaterialsListForProject
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find or create a materials list associated with a project.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateProjectCollectionByName
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find or create a project collection by normalized name.

helperFunctions.name: _ensureSingleUserContext
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to enforce single-user state and initialize user-specific storage.
